Looking at the image, the token (green) is now on the left platform, near the left container. The left container is the dark gray square with the green token inside.
Wait, looking at the image more carefully, I see the green token is now OUTSIDE the left container, to the left of it. The left container still has the original green token inside.
So now there are TWO green tokens visible: one inside the left container and one outside to the left of it.
